name: Japanese Tea Garden
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Golden Gate Park Concourse Authority projects : draft environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2002 Concourse EIR listing the garden as a contributing historic-district feature, eligible for the California Register, and unaltered by the project.

documents.title: New de Young Museum : revisions to final environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: 2001 de Young Museum EIR revisions confirming the garden's individual National Register eligibility and its position bounding the museum site.

documents.title: New de Young Museum project : environmental impact report : draft summary of comments and responses
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 2000 de Young Museum EIR summary analyzing how the proposed museum tower would be visible from the garden.
